articles.title: “The UFC Is Too Big” MVP Tells DJ Why Bellator Fighters Lose In UFC
White House vs Netflix: Which Card Wins? UFC London & PFL Madrid Preview, More | The Craic | 3/20/26
articles.description: Petesy Carroll is joined by The Craic regular Ben Fowlkes to assess the merits of UFC's White House card when pitted against Netflix's first MMA card. Stemming from Nate Diaz's inclusion on the Netflix card, the lads discuss whether this closes the door on a Conor McGregor trilogy fight.
